programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in her home, the apparent victim of suicide. When the evidence points to murder, the team delves into the mysterious past of the woman and her baby.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a shoot-out through the streets of Vegas, leaving a string of dead bodies including a rookie cop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Captain Brass and Detective Curtis are haunted by the death of a rookie cop as Grissom and his CSI team continues to investigate the case of a routine traffic stop turned mile-long shoot-out.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body found in a restaurant dumpster leads Catherine and Brass into the world of competitive eating.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A mother reports her son missing and the investigation quickly focuses on a suspicious man seen in the park. But what appears to be is not, and Catherine finds herself face-to-face with a modern day Medea.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Werewolf in Vegas. The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a young girl's boyfriend is found dead, the CSIs go after her string of ex-boyfriends and suspicious mother to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reunited, the team pieces together the cause of a mysterious explosion at a trailer park, how a stripper ended dead in a street wearing a shopping bag, and how two bodies turned into soup in a trunk.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The pursuit of the American dream leaves a movie star and several immigrant laundry workers dead, in a dark upstairs-downstairs look at the glitter and grime of Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman found dead on the staircase in her suburban home. Suspicion quickly falls on the victim's husband, but the blood spatter evidence tells a different story.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An intruder with a jones for junk food breaks into a residence while a dead body is dumped in the backyard, leading the CSIs to investigate a cult.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick, Warrick, Sara and Greg are sent to eastern Nevada to investigate the disappearance of an entire family.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess. And, an ageing Vegas dancer and socialite.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Lady Heather's daughter is found dead, Grissom and the CSI team are led into a twisted world of medical experimentation conducted by a crazed, Nazi-sympathising pseudo-scientist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A romantic evening ends abruptly when a dead body is found in the chimney of an ageing bachelor's house. Sara, Nick and Brass are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reality television and the all-too-real world of crime scene investigation combine when a young woman is found drugged and sexually assaulted in the hallway of her high rise apartment building.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old homecoming queen is found dead, wrapped in a shower curtain and dumped on the football field, the CSIs go back to school to search for suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When three teenagers are shot to death, when trying to put up posters of their favourite rapper, the team is drawn into the world of hip-hop street gangs and all the violence that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs experience the wedding jitters when they investigate a case in which the mother of the groom is found dead, and tied to the couple's car by her pantyhose.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the assistant of a Hollywood entertainment mogul is murdered during his vacation in Vegas, the CSIs question how the young victim could afford to drive a Ferrari and lodge at a fancy hotel.

programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.desc: While Brass struggles for his life after being shot in the chest, the team investigates the murders of a decapitated victim with a civil war obsession, and a man who killed himself by partying too hard.

programme.desc: Grissom and his team are discouraged when they find a pool of blood as they begin investigating the disappearance of a high school basketball star and his cheerleader girlfriend.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Her battered body was found in a tiny suitcase. During the investigation police uncovered that Kirsty Grabham and her husband both worked in the sex industry.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: On the morning of September 4th, 1981, mum of two Linda Slaten is found murdered in her bedroom in her Lakeland Florida flat. She'd been sexually assaulted while her children slept.

programme.title: Most Likely To Murder
programme.desc: A student goes missing and is later found dead. An anonymous tip reveals the killer is one of their own.

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.desc: Philip Walsted is beaten to death with a bat by neo Nazi David Higdon in Tucson, Arizona in 2002. The killing is revealed to be a hate crime.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: man.

programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: An ex-con sprung from prison stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As a restaurant's bright lights keep Kramer awake, Elaine's job is threatened after she buys George an expensive hat on the company's account.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment. Meanwhile, Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bad cheque threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation; raising chickens leads Kramer into illegal cock-fighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry buys back his parents' old car as the Costanzas eye George's inheritance. Kramer cannot sleep with his new girlfriend. Peterman returns unexpectedly.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks. Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: 1/100: Men Who Took Parental Leave
programme.desc: Only one in seven fathers take parental leave in Japan, mostly only for under two weeks. This episode follows a man who took a full year off to raise two children, revealing a slice of modern Japan.

programme.title: J-Melo

programme.desc: Five-minute shows presenting the limitless, kaleidoscopic appeal of Japanese culture, traditions, and lifestyles in sushi-sized helpings.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Fish that overconsume seaweed, often called pests. A strong odor also makes them hard to sell. Kanazawa Ryuji uses these to make a distinctive fish sauce, so that no life from the sea goes to waste.

programme.title: Somewhere Street

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: House of the Devil
programme.desc: Financially struggling college student Samantha takes a strange babysitting job that coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: Howling V: The Rebirth
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands petty criminal Frank in debt to a ruthless Copenhagen drug lord. Mads Mikkelsen stars in a gritty and violent crime film.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

programme.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
programme.desc: Gestapo agents face killer dolls when they murder puppeteer Toulon's wife in this prequel to "Puppet Master".

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by the demon Sator who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: A medical student (Jeffrey Combs) brings his headless professor back from the dead with a special serum.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning and murder.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
programme.desc: Kristy Cotton is in a psychiatric hospital reliving the hellish events pertaining to a certain puzzle box that contains deadly spirits.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.desc: Customs suspect two men arriving separately may be linked. An aggressive passenger forces action. A suspicious parcel hides an unexpected item.

programme.desc: A head-on crash leaves three people in a serious condition. A police officer finds out that it's one thing to catch a driver but something else to deal with them back at the station.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie try to make a home for themselves in the rough and dangerous 'New World' of America.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie visit his Aunt Jocasta at her plantation, River Run. When tragedy strikes at the plantation, Jamie and Claire find themselves caught between what's right and the law of the land.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire search for a place to call home. Meanwhile, in the 20th-century, Brianna and Roger's romance heats up and then fizzles during a road trip that winds up highlighting their differences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Having been led by providence to Fraser's Ridge, Jamie, Claire and Young Ian begin to build a home in the Blue Ridge Mountains. In the 20th century, Roger tries to reconnect with Brianna.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire's medical expertise proves invaluable, but she begins to fear for her life when tragedy strikes her patients' household. Jamie and Young Ian travel to a nearby town to recruit settlers for Fraser's Ridge.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire are surprised when Lord John Grey drops in on Fraser's Ridge with an unexpected companion; when Grey takes ill, Claire must reconcile her personal feelings with her duties as a doctor.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna follows in her mother's footsteps and travels through the stones back in time to 18th-century Scotland, where she struggles to make her way to the Colonies to find her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger's diligent search for Brianna pays off when he finds her in Wilmington, but their romantic reunion comes to an abrupt halt when she discovers pertinent information that he intentionally kept from her.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Brianna struggles to compartmentalise the trauma she's suffered in the wake of the tragedy that befell her in Wilmington, she refocuses on finding her parents.

programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.desc: Jamie and Claire keep secrets from one another as they try to help Brianna process her recent trauma. But the secrets they keep cause a bigger familial rift once they are revealed.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian embark on a long, uncertain journey to rescue Roger, while Brianna forges a friendship with one of Jamie's old friends as she fends off Aunt Jocasta's attempts to find a husband.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna confronts a violent figure from her past in an attempt to cope with her trauma. Roger befriends a fellow captive and endeavours to escape the Mohawk village.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian's attempt to rescue Roger from his Mohawk captors goes awry when a ghost from Claire's past lays waste to their plan. Brianna worries Claire, Jamie and Roger might not return.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Following celebrations in honour of Brianna and Roger's wedding, Governor Tryon reminds Jamie of his obligation to hunt down and kill Murtagh Fitzgibbons.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.
